steps.title: Use the rate
steps.content: The problem gives the point $(3,26)$ and a rate of change of $7$. That means the slope is $7$.

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content: Use $y=7x+b$ and substitute $(3,26)$: $$26=7(3)+b$$ $$26=21+b$$ $$b=5$$ So the model is $y=7x+5$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The correct answer is $y=7x+5$. It has the required rate of change $7$, and $7(3)+5=26$, so C is correct.
